goal: every page above 9.5/10 across staff-design + skeptical-dev + AI-VC + anti-slop personas

metricClaims.bad-design-audit: score moving = user-visible polish — typography hierarchy, contrast, alignment, surface rhythm
metricClaims.bad-design-audit-findings: count moving = density of visible flaws. Audit's score buckets at integer values, so finding-count is a finer signal than score alone.
metricClaims.persona-staff-design: score moving = Linear/Vercel-level visual craft a senior dev would respect
metricClaims.persona-skeptical-dev: install path is 5s clear, mechanism beats adjective, no crypto-cosplay alarms
metricClaims.persona-ai-vc: 30-sec test passes for Index/Thrive/Greylock partner, no DeFi/restaking/TNT bleed on AI funnel
metricClaims.persona-anti-slop: banned-word density and structural slop approaches zero

round6Baseline.note: Score flat 6.22 across rounds 3-6 BUT findings 68→40 (-41%). Plateau triggered escalation to Gen 3.

round7Result.note: Architectural fan-out + vault-eyebrow cascade fix shipped. Score regressed -0.22 from R6 because /operators and /brand-kit dropped from 7.0 buckets to 6.0; nothing crossed up. Findings flat 40, criticals 7. Plateau confirmed: 4 rounds at 6.0-6.22, score never crossed 7.0 corpus avg.
round7Result.retrospective: Round 7 'plateau' was a misdiagnosis — the audit at 03:17 MDT ran BEFORE the cascade fix shipped at 03:22 MDT. R8 re-baseline confirmed identical state. Real targets were class-based color leaks (wf-h3, wf-body-01) inside .t-section--vault, not the inline-style cascade rule's scope.

round8Result.note: ZERO CRITICALS — first round in the cycle to clear all criticals corpus-wide. Findings 41→30 (-27%). /developers shows 5.0 with 0 findings (audit's holistic LLM score quirk, not a real regression — every dimension axe-clean). Five surgical fixes: wf-* color overrides for .t-section--vault, .home-product-icon brand-dim !important, .surfaces-stage color-dim, CodeTabs pre tabIndex, brand-kit brand-primary→brand-dim.

delivered: Canonical type scale tokens (--type-h1 through --type-h4 + body-l/body/body-s + mono-eyebrow + section-pad-*) in :root of global.css
Section.astro (~50 lines), BentoCell.astro (~80 lines), CtaBlock.astro (~90 lines)
8 pages ported end-to-end: blueprint-agent, /, developers, sandbox, browser-agent, operators, stake, overview
Vault-eyebrow contrast cascade override (.t-section--vault descendant selectors → emerald #047857 5.5:1 on #f4f4f9) — beats inline brand-cool styles

verified.criticals_swept: Vault-eyebrow brand-cool-on-white systemic fix landed (6 pages affected → 0 cascade-override misses, but 2 inline elements on / still slip through cascade)

plateauCallout: RESOLVED — R7 plateau was a stale-baseline misdiagnosis. R8 nets zero criticals + score nudge to 6.11. Score still bucketed at 6.0 avg because remaining 30 findings are 'major' typography/spacing/alignment items, not contrast.
nextStep: Round 9 targets the remaining 30 'major' findings, dominated by: (a) typography hierarchy inconsistency — 5+ pages flag h1/h2/h3 size rhythm despite Gen-3 type tokens; investigate whether wf-h* classes are still overriding tokens and consider removing them from global.css; (b) heading-to-content spacing rhythm — multiple pages flag inconsistent margins (candidate global rule: scoped marketing-page h2/h3 margin-top 32px / margin-bottom 16px); (c) image alignment — flagged on /; check if hero/section images need consistent block + margin auto. Each is a class of finding likely fixable with 1-3 CSS rules; combined effect could move 4+ pages across the 7.0 bucket.
queuedHypothesesForEvolve: Heading rhythm rule: scoped marketing-page h2/h3 { margin-top: 32px; margin-bottom: 16px } — flagged on 6+ pages

Typography hierarchy: audit whether wf-h*/wf-body-* classes still override --type-* tokens (likely root cause of 'inconsistent heading sizes' on 5 pages); consider migrating wf-h3 → token-driven or strip the class entirely
Image consistency: home flags 'images lack consistent alignment' — review hero/section images for block + max-width + margin auto
Hero → main spacing: home flags 'inconsistent vertical spacing between hero and subsequent content'; standardize section margin-top on first content section

Make bad-batch.sh use OPENAI_BASE_URL=https://api.openai.com/v1 by default OR fix the router subscription so the user key isn't in 5/day-cap mode
Move --type-* tokens upstream into @tangle-network/brand for cross-repo reuse
